risk_title: Flood-Related Disruption to School Infrastructure and Service Delivery
risk_summary: Flooding has affected multiple schools, disrupting the program's ability to achieve infrastructure targets and requiring new data collection cycles. This environmental shock has direct implications for service delivery continuity in education.
evidence_quote: Target achieved for the year but most of the schools are affected by floods, so new data will be collected.

risk_title: Supply Chain Disruptions Affecting Essential Health Services
risk_summary: Delays in the supply chain for essential medicines have caused a decline in PHC facility medicine availability (from 70% to 53%), despite timely budget releases. This indicates systemic vulnerabilities in health service delivery that could affect vulnerable populations.
evidence_quote: The funds were released by the Finance Department on time but there appears to be a delay in supply chain of essential medicine. Health Department is requested to investigate the reason of fall in availability of medicine.

risk_title: Interim Government Delays to Budget Integration Reforms
risk_summary: Multi-year budgeting integration was not completed due to interim government, indicating political instability affecting fiscal reform implementation. This suggests governance fragility impacting the program's core financial management objectives.
evidence_quote: Due to interim government, this activity was not completed
